summary: Verified bug fix in Research section HexDiagram: all three SVG text labels (QUANT ANALYSIS, MARKET RESEARCH, SYSTEMATIC) are fully within the SVG viewBox (0 0 400 400) and visible on screen. Regression: heading 'Understanding markets through research.' and research-card-0/1/2 all render correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: HexDiagram labels measured via getBBox — QUANT ANALYSIS bbox x=145.7..254.3, MARKET RESEARCH x=12..128.3, SYSTEMATIC x=310.5..388.0. All within viewBox 0..400. Screen rects also within SVG bounds. Bug fix confirmed.
rca of the issue: Previously 'MARKET RESEARCH' text with textAnchor=middle at x=44 caused half of the label to be clipped left of the SVG viewBox (extending to x ~ -14). Fix: per-node anchor (middle/start/end) with adjusted lx/ly (start at x=12, end at x=388) keeps text fully inside viewBox.
